_id.description: A UUIDv4 identifier for the chat.

_created.description: The timestamp when the chat was created.

_updated.description: The timestamp when the chat was last updated.

userID.description: The UUIDv4 identifier of the user who owns the chat.

modelID.description: The UUIDv4 identifier of the model used in the chat. Optional.

name.description: The name of the chat. Optional.

systemContexts.description: System contexts relevant to the chat.

tools.description: Tools available for the chat, represented by UUIDv4s.
